bug_report.summary: Print preview sidebar no longer shows Orientation (Portrait/Landscape) controls
steps_to_reproduce: Open Print UI (e.g., Hamburger menu → Print… or page context menu → Print…).
expected_behaviors: Print settings sidebar includes an Orientation section with Portrait/Landscape controls.
actual_behaviors: Orientation section is missing from the print settings sidebar; only Destination, Pages, Color mode, More settings, etc. are shown, with no Portrait/Landscape buttons.

bug_report.summary: Print preview shows 600 total sheets/pages for the 300-page test document
steps_to_reproduce: Generate the provided 300-page print test HTML.
expected_behaviors: Print Preview indicates a total page count of about 300 (or at least not doubled).
actual_behaviors: Print Preview shows “600 sheets of paper” and the page indicator shows “1 of 600”.
